case_title: BALLEN,LEE VS MA,MOSES C/O VELOCITY DEVELOPMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $190.00 FILED BY BALLEN,LEE AS TO DEFENDANT MA,MOSES C/O VELOCITY DEVELOPMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALLEN,LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MA,MOSES C/O VELOCITY DEVELOPMENT CORP. $190.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $205.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
